home.heroTitle: From sea to shore, your trusted engineering partner
home.heroSubtitle: High-standard engineering services spanning shipyard new-build and repair, steel construction, infrastructure, and civil construction.

tersaneGemiInsa.title: Shipyard New-Build
tersaneGemiInsa.description: Expertise in pre-fabrication, block joining, steel, outfitting, piping, and insulation for military and civil vessel projects.

tersaneTamir.title: Shipyard Repair
tersaneTamir.description: Hull steel, outfitting, chrome, copper, aluminum, and steel repair and replacement; ship recycling and dismantling operations.

altyapiVeCelikInsa.title: Infrastructure & Steel Construction
altyapiVeCelikInsa.description: Infrastructure, steel building construction, workshop construction, steel structures, roofing, platforms, and ironwork.

insaatSektoru.title: Construction
insaatSektoru.description: Reinforced concrete buildings, facade insulation, pool construction, architectural support, and 3D presentation services.

about.mission: Our core mission is to complete projects to the highest standards by delivering reliable, high-quality, and sustainable solutions across shipyard, construction, and industrial services.
about.vision: To become a benchmark brand in shipyard, construction, and industrial services through an innovative approach, strong field organization, and a quality-first mindset.
